text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Kita! ♪ You've never missed my
birthday ever since we were little.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of, shall we continue our yearly
tradition of celebrating at my place?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, as always, thanks for the invitation!
Birthday parties at your estate always get me
fired up—they're like festivals!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm. And Mother and Father are looking
forward to hearing you sing.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So much so that they might even ask you to
perform from the stage in our garden—the one for
special events.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I'm glad to hear that, but remember what
your father said last time?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
"Would you like to record an official theme song
for the Satono Group?" I thought I was going to
jump out of my skin!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. He was rather enthusiastic, wasn't he?
Your singing must've really moved him.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But now that you've come to the academy and
performed on a real stage, why not consider it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: H-hang on! It's your birthday party. How did we get to talking about me?!
